title: AP Works — Two-Stage EMD Collection (1% at Issue + 1.5% at Agreement)
text_english: EARNEST MONEY DEPOSIT (EMD) under this Contract SHALL be collected in TWO STAGES to discourage purchase of tender documents by NON-SERIOUS BIDDERS: (a) STAGE 1 — Tender documents SHALL be ISSUED to contractors only ON PAYMENT of EMD at {{emd_stage1_pct}}% (default 1%) of the ESTIMATED CONTRACT VALUE at the time of issuing tender documents; (b) STAGE 2 — The Successful Bidder SHALL pay BALANCE EMD of {{emd_stage2_pct}}% (default 1.5%) of the contract value at the TIME OF CONCLUDING THE AGREEMENT. The total EMD shall thus aggregate to {{emd_total_pct}}% (default 2.5%) of the estimated/contract value. THIS REQUIREMENT IS APPLICABLE EVEN IN E-PROCUREMENT.

title: AP Works — Anti-Collusion Tender Schedule Issuance + EMD Forfeiture
text_english: To PREVENT COLLUSION or formation into a ring by contractors: (a) Tender schedules SHALL be issued ONLY UNTIL A DATE PRIOR TO the last date of submission of tenders; (b) Once a contractor BUYS A TENDER SCHEDULE, he SHALL NOT BE PERMITTED to RETURN THE SCHEDULE; (c) After buying a tender schedule, if a contractor DOES NOT TENDER for the work, his EMD SHALL BE FORFEITED (cash, bank guarantee, or both).
